questions.question:
Given two sorted list of size 'm' and 'n' respectively. The number of comparisons needed in the worst case by the merge sort algorithm will be



Algorithms: UGC NET CSE | December 2013 | Part 2 | Question: 25

Mergesort makes two recursive calls. Which statement is true after these two recursive calls finish, but before the merge step ?



Algorithms: UGC NET CSE | June 2014 | Part 2 | Question: 36
options: Elements in each half of the array are sorted amongst themselves.
Elements in the first half of the array are less than or equal to elements in second half of the array.
questions.correct_answer: Elements in each half of the array are sorted amongst themselves.
